Forum Overview

About NRIF

The Nursing Research and Innovation Forum (NRIF) is the flagship annual research and innovation event of the College of Nursing at Imam Abdulrahman Bin Faisal University.

The forum brings together students, faculty members, researchers, healthcare professionals, innovators, and strategic partners to showcase research excellence, foster collaboration, and accelerate innovation that improves healthcare outcomes and quality of life.

Guided by the theme: "Transforming Healthcare Through Research, Innovation, and Multidisciplinary Clinical Impact"

NRIF serves as a platform for scientific exchange, strategic partnerships, healthcare innovation, and translation of research into meaningful societal impact.

Vision

To be a leading nursing research and innovation forum advancing scientific excellence, multidisciplinary collaboration, and transformative healthcare solutions.

Mission

To foster a culture of research, innovation, and scholarly excellence by providing a dynamic platform for knowledge exchange, research dissemination, and strategic collaboration that advances healthcare quality and patient outcomes.

Forum Philosophy

Research • Innovation • Impact

Meaningful healthcare transformation occurs when research creates knowledge, innovation transforms knowledge into solutions, and impact improves lives and communities.

Forum Objectives

What We Aim to Achieve

01
Research Excellence
Showcase high-quality nursing and healthcare research and promote evidence-based practice.
02
Innovation and Healthcare Transformation
Advance innovative solutions, healthcare technologies, digital health, and artificial intelligence.
03
Collaboration and Partnerships
Strengthen academic-clinical partnerships and multidisciplinary collaboration.
04
Student and Faculty Development
Support the growth of future nurse scientists, innovators, and healthcare leaders.
05
Knowledge Exchange
Facilitate dissemination of research findings, best practices, and scientific advancements.
06
Community Impact
Promote research and innovation that improve healthcare quality and population health.
Guiding Principles

Core Values

The Nursing Research and Innovation Forum is guided by a commitment to scientific excellence, collaboration, innovation, and societal impact.

Innovation
We encourage creativity, entrepreneurship, and the development of transformative solutions that address current and future healthcare challenges.
Research Excellence
We promote rigorous, ethical, and impactful research that advances nursing science, healthcare quality, and patient outcomes.
Collaboration
We foster interdisciplinary partnerships among academia, healthcare institutions, industry, and community stakeholders.
Integrity
We uphold the highest standards of professionalism, ethical conduct, transparency, and accountability in research and innovation.
Lifelong Learning
We support continuous professional development, mentorship, and the cultivation of future researchers and healthcare leaders.
Societal Impact
We strive to ensure that research and innovation contribute to improving quality of life and advancing healthcare systems.
Sustainability
We support responsible research and innovation practices that contribute to sustainable healthcare and long-term societal benefit.
Why Attend?

Reasons to Join

  • Explore innovative nursing and healthcare research
  • Learn from national and international experts
  • Discover emerging trends in healthcare innovation
  • Engage with research and innovation leaders
  • Build academic and clinical partnerships
  • Network with researchers, clinicians, and innovators
  • Explore student-led research and innovation projects
Target Audience

Who Should Attend?

Undergraduate Students Graduate Students Faculty Members Researchers Healthcare Professionals Healthcare Leaders Innovators and Entrepreneurs Academic Institutions Healthcare Organizations Strategic Partners Industry Representatives
Strategic Alignment

Aligned with National Priorities

NRIF contributes to advancing healthcare innovation, human capability development, research excellence, and quality of life through impactful nursing and healthcare research.

Saudi Vision 2030
Research, Development and Innovation Authority (RDIA)
Imam Abdulrahman Bin Faisal University Research and Innovation Strategy (2025–2030)
United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)
Innovation and Research Exhibition

Exhibition and Research Showcase

The Innovation and Research Exhibition showcases student, faculty, and collaborative research projects, innovative solutions, and emerging healthcare technologies aligned with the IAU Research & Innovation Strategy (2025–2030), Saudi Vision 2030, RDIA priorities, and the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Highlights

Exhibition Features

  • Research projects and innovation prototypes
  • Strategic alignment with IAU research priorities and SDGs
  • Nursing Research Impact Passport
  • Research and innovation consultations
  • Collaborative networking opportunities
  • Best Research Poster Award
  • Best Innovation Award
Interactive Experience

Nursing Research Impact Passport

Experience research through an interactive digital passport. Participants can explore strategic research zones, discover projects aligned with national priorities, collect Grand Challenge and SDG achievements, and complete the Research Impact Journey.

CON Booth

CON Innovation Booth

Discover innovative research initiatives, healthcare solutions, and emerging projects developed by faculty, students, and innovators from the College of Nursing.

Facilitators: College of Nursing Innovators

IAU Institutes

IAU Institutes and Centers Booth

Engage with research leaders, consultants, and innovators from IAU institutes and research centers highlighting strategic research programs and interdisciplinary collaborations.

Facilitators: IAU Institutes and Centers Consultation Team

Research Alignment Areas
IAU Research and Innovation Strategy (2025–2030) RDIA National Priorities Grand Challenges Frontier Themes Innovation Goals United Nations SDGs
Keynote Lecture

Keynote Speaker

Keynote Lecture

Driving Healthcare Transformation Through Research, Innovation, and Multidisciplinary Clinical Impact

Professor Taqwa Yousif Omar
Her Excellency Member of the Shura Council · Saudi Arabia

This keynote explores how research, innovation, and multidisciplinary collaboration are shaping the future of healthcare — highlighting evidence-based practice, strategic partnerships, and scientific leadership in addressing emerging healthcare challenges.

Interactive Workshop

Workshop

Building Successful Academic–Clinical Research Partnerships

This interactive workshop explores practical approaches to establishing and sustaining successful collaborations between academic institutions and healthcare organizations, with a focus on research logistics, collaboration models, governance, and healthcare impact.

02:30 – 03:30 PM Interactive Session
Dr. Hayat Mushcab
Manager, Research Office · JHAH
Excellence Partners

Partners in Excellence, Empowerment and Impact

Recognizing healthcare organizations and strategic partners whose contributions have played a vital role in educating, mentoring, training, and empowering the next generation of nursing professionals, researchers, and healthcare leaders.
